name: wright-extension
description: A Cursor-like AI coding agent powered by NVIDIA NIM

commands.title: Wright: Inline Edit (describe a change to the selection)

wright.nvidia.apiKey.markdownDescription: NVIDIA NIM API key from [build.nvidia.com](https://build.nvidia.com). If empty, Wright falls back to the `NVIDIA_API_KEY` env var, then to a `.env` file at the workspace root.

wright.nvidia.apiKeys.markdownDescription: Additional NVIDIA API keys for automatic rotation. When a request hits a rate limit (429), Wright switches to the next key automatically. Add several free-tier keys here to raise effective throughput.

wright.fallback.ollama.description: When every cloud provider is rate-limited or unavailable, fall back to your local Ollama (free forever, no limits).

wright.fallback.ollamaModel.description: Ollama model used for the local fallback (must support tool calling for agent work).

wright.fallback.providers.markdownDescription: Custom OpenAI-compatible providers appended to the failover chain (after first-class providers, before Ollama). Prefer Wright Settings → Providers for OpenRouter, Groq, Gemini, etc.

wright.providers.openrouter.enabled.description: Include OpenRouter in the chat picker and failover chain when an API key is set.

wright.providers.openrouter.apiKey.markdownDescription: OpenRouter API key from [openrouter.ai](https://openrouter.ai). Models appear as `openrouter:…` in the picker.

wright.providers.openrouter.models.description: OpenRouter free coding models (must still be $0 on openrouter.ai/models). DeepSeek :free removed; Qwen :free retiring Jul 2026.

wright.providers.deepseek.enabled.description: Include DeepSeek in the chat picker and failover chain when an API key is set.

wright.providers.deepseek.apiKey.markdownDescription: DeepSeek API key from [platform.deepseek.com](https://platform.deepseek.com) — strong coding + reasoning.

wright.providers.deepseek.models.description: DeepSeek model ids shown in the picker.

wright.providers.groq.enabled.description: Include Groq in the chat picker and failover chain when an API key is set.

wright.providers.groq.models.description: Groq model ids shown in the picker (Llama 3.3 70B / Qwen3 — strong free coding speed).

wright.providers.gemini.enabled.description: Include Google Gemini in the chat picker and failover chain when an API key is set.

wright.providers.gemini.models.description: Gemini model ids for the picker. Prefer 3.5 Flash — 2.5 Flash is blocked for new users; Pro is paid-only.

wright.providers.cerebras.enabled.description: Include Cerebras in the chat picker and failover chain when an API key is set.

wright.providers.cerebras.models.description: Cerebras model ids for the picker. llama-3.3-70b / qwen-3-32b were deprecated — use gpt-oss-120b.

wright.providers.mistral.enabled.description: Include Mistral in the chat picker and failover chain when an API key is set.

wright.providers.mistral.models.description: Mistral model ids shown in the picker (Codestral for code, Large for reasoning).

wright.model.chat.description: Primary model for chat and (later) the agent. Must support tool calling.

wright.model.embed.description: Embedding model for codebase indexing (semantic search).

wright.model.vision.description: Multimodal model used when the chat message includes an image. Must accept image input.

enumDescriptions: Keyless, but only covers well-known topics (instant-answer API)
Full web search (requires an API key from tavily.com)
Full web search (requires a Brave Search API key)
wright.webSearch.provider.description: Backend for the agent's web_search tool.

wright.webSearch.apiKey.markdownDescription: API key for the chosen web search provider (Tavily or Brave). Not needed for DuckDuckGo.

enumDescriptions: Every file edit and shell command asks for approval
File edits run silently; shell commands ask (allowlisted ones run)
Everything runs silently except deny-listed commands and protected paths
wright.approvalMode.description: How much Wright's agent can do without asking.

wright.pricing.inputPer1M.description: USD per 1M input tokens, for the session cost estimate (0 = show token counts only).

wright.pricing.outputPer1M.description: USD per 1M output tokens, for the session cost estimate (0 = show token counts only).

wright.autocomplete.enabled.description: Ghost-text tab completions via a local Ollama FIM model (never uses NVIDIA quota). Silently inactive if Ollama isn't running.

wright.autocomplete.model.description: Ollama model for autocomplete. Must support fill-in-middle (the 'insert' capability).

wright.autocomplete.ollamaUrl.description: Base URL of the local Ollama server.

wright.models.list.markdownDescription: Models shown in the chat picker. Add or remove any NVIDIA NIM model id (must support tool calling for agent work — check with `pnpm verify -- <id>`). "auto" is always included.

wright.edits.autoKeep.description: Automatically keep all agent edits after each turn (skip the manual Keep all). Files remain revertible only until the turn ends.

wright.mcp.servers.markdownDescription: MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers whose tools the agent can use. Example: `{"github": {"command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-github"]}}`. MCP tools require approval except in auto mode.

wright.ollama.url.markdownDescription: Ollama server URL. Point this at a REMOTE Ollama (e.g. a rented GPU box: `http://your-server:11434`) to run big local models off-machine — the picker, downloads, and fallback all follow it.
